---
title: "prompt_linter.py"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/src/core/prompt_linter.py"
loc: 48
complexity: 16
logic_score: 3.68
style_score: 3.81
intel_score: 6.40
overall_score: 3.97
---

## Intent
Python module facilitating PromptLinter, parse_prompty_vars.

## Interaction Protocol
Import PromptLinter and call its primary methods.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 3.7/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.8/10
- **Intel [I]**: 6.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 9 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [ast](file://ast)
- [os](file://os)
- [re](file://re)

### Exports
- `PromptLinter`
- `parse_prompty_vars`
- `audit_python_invocation`
- `calculate_integrity_score`
